name: Longan Dragon Cookie
description:
"In ancient times when right or wrong was decided through power, lived an Ivory Dragon who was feared but feared nothing. The dragon thought the weak did not deserve life and turned their dough into stone if one ever dared to look into the dragon's eyes. The world is in the palm of the dragon's hands as the floating four eyes see beyond a millennium. The all-seeing dragon indeed foresaw the day the giant wings would fall crashing to the ground, so the dragon fell into a deep sleep. After some time had passed, the footsteps of cookies started to fill the land, and the Ivory Dragon had finally awakened! A raging storm of the dragon's plans will begin to devour the land. Will the Ivory Dragon successfully crumble all crunchy beings and reconstruct the nostalgic past?"

._._._._.

Trying (And Failing) To Infiltrate The Ivory Dragon's Lair

._._._._.

Requested? ☑Yes ☐No
